banner.title: System Configuration Alert
banner.apiError: Failed to reach backend API: {{error}}. Make sure the FastAPI server is running.
banner.dbError: The backend API is connected, but it could not reach the PostgreSQL database. Verify your DATABASE_URL configuration.

hero.tagline: Instantly decode packed food ingredients. Upload an image of any food product packaging ingredients list and Gemini Vision will extract the text.

upload.title: Analyze Food Label
upload.subtitle: Capture or pick a photo of the ingredients list on the packaging.
upload.hint: Or click to select a file (JPEG, PNG up to 5MB)

errors.title: Analysis/Upload Error
errors.invalidType: Invalid file type. Only JPEG and PNG images are supported on the front-end.
errors.fileTooLarge: File size exceeds the 5MB limit. Please upload a smaller file.

ai.title: AI Ingredient Extraction
ai.desc: Once you upload a label, Gemini Vision will review the image, isolate lists of food additives, compounds, and active ingredients, and extract them.

blur.title: Focus & Blur Protection
blur.desc: Our local computer vision system runs a real-time blur assessment on your photo, ensuring only high-quality uploads reach Gemini, preserving API quotas.

safety.title: Ingredient Safety Assessment
safety.subtitle: Comprehensive layperson safety analysis, allergen alerts, and safe limits
safety.loading: Running 3-layer lookup system for each ingredient...
safety.loadingSubtitle: Matching against database, Open Food Facts, and Gemini AI

alternative.heading: Try this instead:
alternative.disclaimer: Suggested by Gemini AI · For Indian consumers · Always consult a nutritionist for personalised advice

footer.tagline: Designed for health-conscious shoppers. Empowering healthy food decisions.
